name: wonderwhy-er
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        wonderwhy-er /

      DesktopCommanderMCP  

    
      This is MCP server for Claude that gives it terminal control, file system search and diff file editing capabilities
summary: 该项目为Claude构建了MCP服务器，使其具备终端控制、文件系统搜索和差异文件编辑能力，值得关注的是它极大扩展了AI助手对本地系统的操作权限。

name: agent-skills
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        addyosmani /

      agent-skills  

    
      Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents.
summary: 该项目为AI编程助手提供生产级别的工程技能，帮助提升代码质量和开发效率，值得开发者关注以优化AI协作编程体验。

name: meshoptimizer
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        zeux /

      meshoptimizer  

    
      Mesh optimization library that makes meshes smaller and faster to render
summary: 这是一个用于网格优化的C++库，能够显著减小网格体积并提升渲染效率，特别适合实时图形应用。

name: stitch-skills
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        google-labs-code /

      stitch-skills  

    
      A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.
summary: 这是一个为AI编程代理设计的技能库，遵循开放标准让开发者能轻松扩展AI的代码能力，值得关注因为它来自Google实验室且兼容主流AI编程工具。

name: OfficeCLI
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        iOfficeAI /

      OfficeCLI  

    
      OfficeCLI is the first and best Office suite purpose-built for AI agents to read, edit, and automate Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files. Free, open-source, single binary, no Office installation required.
summary: OfficeCLI是首个专为AI智能体设计的Office工具套件，无需安装Office即可直接读写和自动化处理Word、Excel及PowerPoint文档，其开源免费和轻量单文件的特性值得关注。

name: grpc
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        grpc /

      grpc  

    
      C++ based gRPC (C++, Python, Ruby, Objective-C, PHP, C#)
summary: gRPC是一个高性能、跨语言的远程过程调用框架，支持多种编程语言，值得关注因为它是现代微服务架构中实现高效服务间通信的核心工具。

name: next.js
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        vercel /

      next.js  

    
      The React Framework
summary: Next.js 是基于 React 的全栈框架，提供开箱即用的混合渲染、智能打包等特性，大幅简化现代化 Web 应用开发流程。

name: bun
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        oven-sh /

      bun  

    
      Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
summary: Bun 是一个集 JavaScript 运行时、打包工具、测试运行器和包管理器于一体的全能工具链，凭借其卓越的性能和一体化设计显著提升了开发效率。
